name: Curried Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Saute the onions until golden brown.
2. Add the curry powder and flour to the onions. Stir continuously until a smooth paste forms.
3. Gradually incorporate the chicken stock, cream, and milk into the mixture. Stir well, ensuring everything is combined smoothly.
4. Continue cooking until the sauce thickens. Remove from heat and gently fold in the cooked rice, allowing it to absorb all the liquid for about 5 minutes.
5. Serve the curried rice hot with a sprinkle of curry powder on top.
